In the said notification, the para No. 4 shall be replaced as under :— "The term of the Committee shall, unless sooner dissolved, be up to 18-10-2011." [R No. 25/34/2010-A WD] ANJANI KUMAR, Director (Animal Welfare) Note :— The notification constituting the Committee for the purpose of Control and Supervision of Experimentation on Animal (CPCSEA) was published in the Gazette of India vide number S.O. 32(E) dated 10-1-2003 which was subsequently amended numberS.0.599(E) dated 26-5-2003;S.O.955(E)dated21-8-2003;S.O.69(E) dated 15-1-2004; S.O. 85 (E)dated25-l-2005; S.O. 1817(E) dated 19-10-2006; S.O. 1328(E) dated 7-6-2010. 4393 GI/2010 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
